market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: 12% Below Market – Modern 2‑Bed Near City Centre
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to a modern, fully‑furnished two‑bedroom apartment perfectly positioned just minutes from Newcastle city centre. This entire home comfortably sleeps up to four guests, offering a spacious living area, a well‑equipped kitchen, and two bright bedrooms—all designed with contemporary style and convenience in mind. With a nightly rate of £153.20, you’re enjoying a price that is 12 % lower than the city’s median (£175), delivering exceptional value for travellers seeking comfort and location without the premium price tag.

The apartment has earned a strong 4.8 rating from five recent guests, reflecting high satisfaction with cleanliness, accuracy, and host communication. Although the host, Yasir, is new to Airbnb, the positive reviews demonstrate a commitment to a great guest experience. The property is ideal for small families, business travellers, or groups of friends looking to explore Newcastle’s attractions, dining, and nightlife while returning to a quiet, modern retreat.

With a current 90‑day occupancy of just 19.6 % (72 open nights), there is ample opportunity to secure more bookings at this attractive rate. Book now and enjoy the best of Newcastle from a stylish, budget‑friendly base.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright, wide‑angle shot of the living room with modern furnishings as the cover photo—it showcases the space and location instantly.
key_diagnosis: Highlight the 12 % price advantage in the title and description (rate £153.2 vs cohort median £175) to attract price‑sensitive guests and improve the current 19.6 % occupancy versus the market 28.3 % median.
Add high‑value amenities—parking, outdoor space, and entertainment—to the listing; these categories drive bookings and can justify the low rate while filling the amenities score gap.

Upload at least 8 high‑quality photos covering the living area, kitchen, both bedrooms, bathroom, and building exterior, then set the living‑room image as the cover to boost the images score from 2 to a competitive level.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your nightly rate is 12 % below the Newcastle market average (£153 vs £175) yet your next‑90‑day occupancy sits at just 19.6 %—a clear opportunity to boost bookings.
